title: cerinthodes alpinum
intro: Cerinthodes alpinum, also known as the Alpine Cerinthodes, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Cerinthodes alpinum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption.
